---
title: "About"
subtitle: "a bit more about me, both inside and outside of my job"
title-block-banner: true
---

## {{< fa chalkboard-teacher title="A teacher at a chalkboard" >}} Professional Profile

I am a results-driven data professional with six years of experience in the IT sector, currently refining my expertise through a Master’s in Business Analytics at Dublin City University. My background includes a strong foundation in ETL development and data visualization, with a proven track record of delivering technical solutions at global organizations like Cognizant and Infosys. I am particularly interested in the strategic application of machine learning and data science to drive innovation in healthcare and social entrepreneurship.

## {{< fa graduation-cap title="A mortarboard" >}} Education

## {{< fa image title="A picture" >}} DCU Campus

![Dublin City University, where I am pursuing my MSc in Business Analytics](images/dcu.jpg){fig-alt="DCU Campus" width="80%"}

| Degree | Institution | Year |
|--------|------------|------|
| MSc Business Analytics | Dublin City University | 2024–2025 |
| BE Computer Science | P.E.S College of Engineering | 2015–2019 |

## {{< fa briefcase title="A professional toolbox or briefcase" >}} Skills

| Category | Skills |
|----------|--------|
| Programming | Python, SQL |
| Tools | Quarto, Git, Excel, Power BI |
| Analytics | Machine Learning, Data Visualisation, Statistics |

## {{< fa rocket title="A rocket ship" >}} Goals

::: {.callout-note}
I am currently open to internship and graduate opportunities in 
data analytics and business intelligence.
:::

I aim to bridge the gap between raw data and actionable 
business insights — helping organisations make smarter, evidence-based 
decisions that drive real value.

With a strong foundation in ETL development, Python, and machine learning, 
I am keen to apply these skills in a role where data strategy and business 
outcomes go hand in hand.

Going forward, I aim to apply these skills in healthcare analytics or 
social entrepreneurship — fields where data-driven insights can create 
meaningful real-world impact.

## {{< fa signs-post title="A signpost with multiple directions" >}} My Learning Journey

Here is my progress throughout this module:

- [x] Set up Quarto project
- [x] Configured GitHub Pages
- [x] Built project pages with Python code
- [x]  Complete final reflections
- [x] Submit portfolio

::: {.custom-highlight}
I am passionate about using data to drive better business decisions.
:::

[^1]: I am currently pursuing my MSc at DCU's Business School, one of Ireland's 
leading business analytics programmes.
